title: CapitalProject
description: A DDC-managed capital construction project — the core unit of the Department of Design and Construction. Canonical schema reconciling DDC's three Active Projects datasets: 'Active Projects' (3ss8-m844, 8 columns), 'Active Projects - Infrastructure (Historical)' (rukc-mmqu, 9 columns), and 'Active Projects - Public Buildings (Historical)' (g9ub-hrve, 9 columns). Keyed on Project ID. NOTE: DDC publishes these only as periodic/historical snapshots — there is no live project-status API.

projectId.description: DDC Project ID ('Project ID') — primary key.

portfolio.description: Which capital portfolio the project belongs to (derived from the source dataset / Division).

clientAgency.description: The sponsoring/owner agency DDC is building for ('Client Agency').

projectedConstructionCompletion.description: Projected construction completion date/period ('Projected Construction Completion').

historical.description: True when sourced from a '(Historical)' snapshot dataset rather than the current Active Projects feed.
